name: In-Context Reinforcement Learning under Non-Stationarity: A Survey

description: arXiv:2607.11906v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: The development of decision-pretrained transformers, algorithm distillation, long-context meta-RL, and retrieval-augmented agents has renewed interest in in-context reinforcement learning (ICRL): the ability of a pretrained or fine-tuned decision model to infer latent task rules and improve future behavior from interaction context, without test-ti...
author: A Run, Ziluo Ding
